attributes.title: PostgreSQL — SQL CRUD by origin
attributes.description: Stamped Postgres statements (application_name webserver-benchmark-*;req=...). Click correlation.request_id to open HTTP handler logs.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"service: webserver-benchmark-postgres and (message: *execute* or message: *statement: SELECT* or message: *statement: INSERT* or message: *statement: UPDATE* or message: *statement: DELETE*) and not message: duration* and not message: *SELECT 1* and not message: *connection* and not message: *disconnection* and not message: *set_config*","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
